mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts a JOIN vw_account_display d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
AND d.nickname LIKE '%' || #{nickname} || '%'
AND d.handle LIKE '%' || #{handle} || '%'
AND a.role_type = #{roleType}
AND a.status = #{status}
AND a.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{createdFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND a.created_at < TO_DATE(#{createdTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reports r WHERE r.target_account_id = a.account_id AND r.status = 0 )

SELECT a.account_id AS accountId, a.role_type AS roleType, a.status AS status, a.email AS email, a.phone AS phone, a.region AS region, TO_CHAR(a.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt,
-- 표시용(유저/트레이너는 vw, 기업은 회사명) CASE WHEN a.role_type = 'BUSINESS' THEN bp.company_name ELSE d.nickname END AS nickname,
-- 기업 전용도 DTO에 따로 채워줌(원하면 화면에서 companyName을 따로 쓰기 쉬움) bp.company_name AS companyName,
d.handle AS handle,
mp.url AS profileImageUrl, mb.url AS bannerImageUrl,
-- user_profile (USER/TRAINER) up.intro AS intro, TO_CHAR(up.birth_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS birthDate, up.gender AS gender, up.career_years AS careerYears, up.account_number AS accountNumber,
-- 인증 관련: role에 따라 source 분기 CASE WHEN a.role_type = 'BUSINESS' THEN bp.verification_status ELSE up.verification_status END AS verificationStatus,
CASE WHEN a.role_type = 'BUSINESS' THEN TO_CHAR(bp.verified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE TO_CHAR(up.verified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS verifiedAt,
-- business only bp.biz_reg_no AS bizRegNo
FROM accounts a JOIN vw_account_display d ON a.account_id = d.account_id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON a.account_id = up.account_id LEFT JOIN business_profile bp ON a.account_id = bp.account_id
LEFT JOIN media_files mp ON mp.ref_type='PROFILE' AND mp.ref_id=a.account_id LEFT JOIN media_files mb ON mb.ref_type='BANNER' AND mb.ref_id=a.account_id
WHERE a.account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trainers_reviews WHERE user_account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE target_account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_suspensions WHERE account_id = #{accountId}

SELECT a.account_id AS accountId, d.nickname AS nickname, d.handle AS handle, a.role_type AS roleType, a.status AS status, TO_CHAR(a.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM accounts a JOIN vw_account_display d ON a.account_id = d.account_id WHERE a.status = 'PENDING' AND a.role_type IN ('TRAINER','BUSINESS') ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
SELECT role_type FROM accounts WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_profile SET verification_status = 'APPROVED', verified_at = SYSDATE WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE user_profile SET verification_status = 'REJECTED', verified_at = NULL WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE business_profile SET verification_status = 'APPROVED', verified_at = SYSDATE WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE business_profile SET verification_status = 'REJECTED', verified_at = NULL WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
